_comment_results_subdir: Subdirectory under tuning_results/ for organizing results
_comment_edit_ngam: Set to true to set NGAM (ATPM) lower bound to 0 during optimization
_comment_enable_maintenance_sweep: Set to true to run NGAM/GAM parameter sweep

fva._comment_opt_ratio: Fraction of optimal biomass to constrain during FVA (0.9 = 90% of optimal)
fva._comment_workers: Set to null for auto-detection (uses all CPU cores)
fva._comment_chunk_size: Number of reactions per task. null = auto-calculate. Larger = less overhead but less load balancing

simulated_annealing._comment_aggressive: AGGRESSIVE SETTINGS - larger perturbations and longer search
simulated_annealing._comment_temperature: High starting temp (100) for large initial exploration
simulated_annealing._comment_biomass_goal: Target goal based on COBRApy slim_optimize: 0.0973
simulated_annealing._comment_n_top_enzymes: Tune top 100 enzymes (scaled by model size: 1266 reactions)

maintenance_sweep._comment_ngam_range: NGAM values to test (ATPM lower bound in mmol/gDW/h). Higher values (10-100) to reduce biomass toward goal.
maintenance_sweep._comment_gam_range: GAM values to test (ATP in biomass, mmol/gDW). Higher values (75.55-300) to reduce biomass.
